title: MDR Escalation Process - Vectra XDR
content:
This playbook retrieves the MDR ticket number associated with the given entity by parsing its notes. It then collects the entity's active detections, performs a detection assessment, and sends the results to the designated recipient via email.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Vectra AI pack (VectraXDR, partner-supported).

Use cases: Network Security, Asset Management, Vulnerability Management, Breach Notification, Incident Response.

Inputs — entity_id: The ID of the entity.; entity_type: The type of the entity.; recipient_email: The recipient email address for MDR escalation process.; detection_assessment_limit: The number of the active detection to be assessed..

Integrations/scripts used: Print, Set, VectraXDRGenerateMailBody, send-mail, vectra-entity-detection-list, vectra-entity-note-list.

version: -1
name: MDR Escalation Process - Vectra XDR
description: This playbook retrieves the MDR ticket number associated with the given entity by parsing its notes. It then collects the entity's active detections, performs a detection assessment, and sends the results to the designated recipient via email.

      type: regular
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:

      - "3"
    scriptarguments:
      append:
        simple: "false"
      key:
        simple: MDRTicketNumber
      value:
        complex:
          root: EntityNote
          transformers:
          - operator: StringifyArray

            args:
              error_if_no_match: {}
              ignore_case: {}
              multi_line: {}
              period_matches_newline: {}
              regex:
                value:
                  simple: \[MDR#[0-9]+\]
              unpack_matches: {}
          - operator: FirstArrayElement
    separatecontext: false

inputs:
